question_intent: Average goals scored by players from Eastern Conference teams from 1980 to 1989

plan.question_intent: Average goals scored by players from Eastern Conference teams from 1980 to 1989
plan.detail_query:
SELECT leaf_1.firstname, leaf_1.lastname, leaf_1.year, leaf_1.tmid, leaf_1.gp, leaf_1.g
FROM scoring AS leaf_1
JOIN master AS m ON leaf_1.playerid = m.playerid
JOIN teams AS t ON leaf_1.tmid = t.tmid
WHERE (t.confid = 'EC') AND (leaf_1.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 1989)

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM scoring AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM scoring AS leaf_1
JOIN master AS m ON leaf_1.playerid = m.playerid
JOIN teams AS t ON leaf_1.tmid = t.tmid
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM scoring AS leaf_1
JOIN master AS m ON leaf_1.playerid = m.playerid
JOIN teams AS t ON leaf_1.tmid = t.tmid
WHERE (t.confid = 'EC')
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM scoring AS leaf_1
JOIN master AS m ON leaf_1.playerid = m.playerid
JOIN teams AS t ON leaf_1.tmid = t.tmid
WHERE (t.confid = 'EC') AND (leaf_1.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 1989)
LIMIT 5

JOIN teams AS t ON leaf_1.tmid = t.tmid
WHERE (t.confid = 'EC') AND (leaf_1.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 1989)

build_logs.notes: Calculates the average goals scored by players from Eastern Conference teams from 1980 to 1989

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT m.firstname, m.lastname, leaf_1.year, leaf_1.tmid, leaf_1.gp, leaf_1.g
FROM scoring AS leaf_1
JOIN master AS m ON leaf_1.playerid = m.playerid
JOIN teams AS t ON leaf_1.tmid = t.tmid
WHERE (t.confid = 'EC') AND (leaf_1.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 1989)) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.g)
FROM (SELECT m.firstname, m.lastname, leaf_1.year, leaf_1.tmid, leaf_1.gp, leaf_1.g
FROM scoring AS leaf_1
JOIN master AS m ON leaf_1.playerid = m.playerid
JOIN teams AS t ON leaf_1.tmid = t.tmid
WHERE (t.confid = 'EC') AND (leaf_1.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 1989)) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_1.g)
FROM (SELECT m.firstname, m.lastname, s.g
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN master AS m ON s.playerid = m.playerid
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
WHERE (t.confid = 'EC')) AS leaf_1

question: What is the average value of *g* for players in the EC conference between 1980 and 1989?
